For 12 years, Showbiz411.com has been covering Hollywood, Broadway, the music business and the business of celebrity. # Michael Jackson’s Nephew Says His Father and Jackson Brothers Were Told They Were “Worthless” Without Star. Taj Jackson is one of three sons of the late Tito Jackson, one of Michael’s older brothers. On social media this morning, Taj answered a fan’s question bluntly about how the other brothers grew up with Michael as the star of family. Tito — an accomplished a guitarist — Marlon, Jackie, and Jermaine were the original members of the jackson 5 along with Michael. Despite Jermaine getting a singing part on the group’s hit “I’ll Be There,” he and the others were relegated to status of second class citizen. But Michael was cruel to his brothers when it came to their careers.

recentArticles.title: Paris Jackson Wins Fight to Claw Back $625,000 in Bonuses Paid to Estate Lawyers: 'Massive Win' - Rolling Stone
recentArticles.snippet: "The Jackson family will finally get the transparency and accountability measures Paris has fought for," said a spokesperson for the actress and musician. Paris Jackson has won her bid to force three lawyers to return $625,000 in bonuses paid by John Branca, the executor of her father’s estate. In a 23-page ruling, unsealed Tuesday and obtained by *Rolling Stone*, the retired judge, who long presided over Michael Jackson’s probate case and is now serving as a private referee on the complex case, granted Paris’ motion to claw back the 2018 payments. “Paris has always been focused on what’s best for her family, and this ruling is a massive win for them,” the statement said. A spokesperson for the estate issued a statement saying the executors disagreed with the retired judge’s decision but planned to “fully respect it.” The statement noted Beckloff praised the work of the executors, writing in his ruling that “there can be no dispute that under the expertise of the executors, this estate has transformed from teetering on the brink of bankruptcy in June of 2009 when Michael Jackson died to the financial powerhouse that it is today.”.

recentArticles.snippet: Find this story in your account’s ‘Saved for Later’ section. In a new *Time*interview, Nicki Minaj says her newfound friendship with Donald Trump is, in part, an extension of her beef with Jay-Z. According to Minaj, Jay’s chumminess with former president Obama alienated a lot of the hip-hop community, herself included. “I think Jay-Z ended up costing Obama a lot, whether he knows it or not,” she says. “Lots of rappers don’t like Jay-Z and were afraid to say it.”. She discusses hiding her true political feelings for fear of turning off either fans or the music business in general. “I felt that way already about him, just that I didn’t dare act like that publicly,” Minaj says. “It’s been ingrained in everyone’s brain in the music business that we are supposed to be a Democratic family. recentArticles.title: Katseye Announces ‘Wildworld’ 2026 Tour Dates - Variety
recentArticles.snippet: Katseye have announced dates for the “Wildworld” tour, taking the group to North America, the U.K. and Europe this fall. Produced by Live Nation, the run will kick off on September 1 at Dublin’s 3Arena, with North American dates launching October 13 in Miami at Kaseya Center and before wrapping in Mexico City on November 27. Tickets will first be available starting with a Weverse Artist Presale (details below) beginning Wednesday, May 20, at 11:00 AM local time, followed by the Katseye.World Presale at 3:00 PM local time. The Weverse Artist Presale, available to paid Weverse membership holders, will take place on Wednesday, May 20, from 11:00 AM – 2:00 PM local time. The tour will also offer VIP experiences to take your concert experience to the next level, available for purchase via Katseye’s Weverse Shop (EU, UK, MX, CA) and KATSEYE’s Official Store (US), beginning Thursday, May 21. This presale will take place on Wednesday, May 20, from 3:00 PM – 10:00PM local time.

recentArticles.title: Noah Kahan gets a No. 1 album at last, while Michael Jackson reenters the top 10 - VPM
recentArticles.snippet: # Noah Kahan gets a No. 1 album at last, while Michael Jackson reenters the top 10. Noah Kahan's coronation as an A-list superstar is complete, as *The Great Divide* debuts atop the *Billboard* 200 albums chart — and all of its songs land on this week's Hot 100. That record has sat on the *Billboard* 200 albums chart for more than three years — and in 2024, its title track became his first top 10 hit. But it's never taken him all the way to the top of the albums chart, until now. His fourth album, *The Great Divide*, debuts at No. 1 this week thanks to blockbuster sales — 175,000 copies sold — and the biggest streaming numbers for any record released this year. Consider this: On the day of *The Great Divide*'s release, Kahan's label dropped a deluxe edition (*The Great Divide: The Last of the Bugs*) on streaming services, expanding the album from 17 songs to 21.

recentArticles.snippet: # Paris Jackson Scores Big $$$ Win in Fight With Michael's Estate, Judge Praises Executors. **Paris Jackson** scored a major win in her battle over money spent by the executors running her late father **Michael Jackson**'s estate -- while the executors also received praise for their work ... According to court docs, obtained by TMZ, a Los Angeles judge ruled that $625K in bonuses -- paid by executors **John Branca** and **John McClain** to third-party law firms -- will have to be returned to the estate. The rep added, “While the Court has previously approved several other bonuses to outside counsel over the years for their extraordinary services, and this was the first time they were the subject of objections, the Executors have always understood that legal fees are subject to court approval and have always required outside counsel to agree to return any funds to the estate if the payments were not approved.” The rep pointed out the bonuses were not paid to the executors themselves but rather to outside law firms.

recentArticles.title: Global 200: Justin Bieber and Nicki Minaj Hold the Crown - Live India
recentArticles.snippet: # Billboard Global Charts: Justin Bieber Retains #1; These Are Top Artists. The latest Billboard Global charts (dated May 16, 2026) show a mix of 2010s nostalgia, K-pop dominance, and a massive resurgence for the King of Pop. While **Justin Bieber** continues his global reign, the real story lies in the “biopic boost” currently fueling **Michael Jackson’s** legendary catalog. ## **Global 200: Justin Bieber and Nicki Minaj Hold the Crown**. Justin Bieber’s **“Beauty and a Beat,”** featuring Nicki Minaj, celebrates its second consecutive week at **No. 1** on the Billboard Global 200. * **The Coachella Factor:** The song’s resurgence is largely credited to Bieber’s performance at the **Coachella Valley Music and Arts Festival** in April, reminding global audiences of the 2013 hit. Following the April 24 premiere of the biopic ***Michael***, Jackson’s hits are flooding the charts at levels not seen since the digital era began. * **Historical Context:** These are Jackson’s **first-ever Top 10 hits** on the Global 200 since the chart’s inception in 2020.

John Legend will help kick off the Summer for the City festival on June 1 with a performance at David Geffen Hall in Manhattan, *Billboard* can exclusively reveal. The EGOT-winning, Billboard Hot 100-topping artist joins the roster of a gala that is set to fete ballet trailblazer Misty Copeland (the first Black woman promoted to principal dancer at the American Ballet Theatre) with the inaugural Lincoln Center luminary award, as well as honor Andreas C. recentArticles.title: Sony Publishing to Acquire Recognition Music in Billion-Plus Dollar Deal - Variety Australia
recentArticles.snippet: # Sony Publishing to Acquire Recognition Music in Billion-Plus Dollar Deal, Including Songs by Fleetwood Mac, Beyonce, Lady Gaga. As expected, Sony Music Publishing has announced an agreement to acquire the complete music rights portfolio of Recognition Music Group from funds managed by Blackstone, subject to customary closing conditions. The deal will see Sony Music Publishing acquiring Recognition’s entire catalog of works, which includes shares in more than 45,000 songs, among them Journey’s “Don’t Stop Believin’,” Red Hot Chili Peppers’ “Under the Bridge,” Fleetwood Mac’s “Go Your Own Way,” Beyoncé’s “Single Ladies (Put A Ring On It),” Bruno Mars’ “Locked Out of Heaven,” Leonard Cohen’s “Hallelujah,” Chic’s “Good Times,” Soundgarden’s “Black Hole Sun,” Lady Gaga’s “Bad Romance,” Bon Jovi’s “Livin’ On A Prayer,” Rihanna’s “Umbrella,” Eurythmics’ “Sweet Dreams (Are Made Of This),” Shakira’s “Whenever, Wherever,” Steve Winwood’s “Higher Love” and Mariah Carey’s “All I Want For Christmas Is You,” among many others. The deal is in partnership with the investment venture announced earlier this year between GIC and Sony Music Group, focused on acquiring music catalog assets across genres and international markets. The transaction follows Sony Music Publishing’s previous acquisition of Hipgnosis Songs Group in 2025, reflecting its continued collaboration with Recognition and Blackstone.
recentArticles.summary: Sony Music Publishing宣布將收購Recognition Music Group的音樂版權組合，其中包括多位國際知名藝人的歌曲，但與周杰倫無直接關聯。

recentArticles.snippet: # Jeff Ross on the ‘Real Tension’ Behind the ‘Roast of Kevin Hart,’ His Favorite Cut Joke and Who He Wants to Skewer Next (EXCLUSIVE). It wouldn’t be a roast without the Roastmaster General. Jeff Ross came out guns blazing at Netflix’s live skewering of Kevin Hart, the second installment in a series of “GOAT” roasts that was hosted by Shane Gillis. Dressed in a replica of Eddie Murphy’s red leather getup from “Delirious,” Ross needled Hart about going to a Diddy party, his “pieces of shit” movies and his upbringing. An admittedly hungover Ross called up *Variety* to break down the edgiest moments of the three-hour broadcast, the joke that didn’t make it to air and who he wants to roast next. recentArticles.title: These Billionaires Were Raised By Single Mothers - Forbes
recentArticles.snippet: ## From Elon Musk to Jay-Z, these members of the Forbes list have an extra reason to be thankful for this Mother’s Day. In the case of these billionaires, it was actually a great mother who helped them defy the odds to join the three-comma club. Meanwhile two of the most famous self-made women billionaires on the planet got their starts as single moms: Diane Hendricks, who got pregnant as a teen, divorced her baby’s father young and went on to support her son by becoming a Playboy Bunny and working in real estate before remarrying, while single mom JK Rowling was on welfare when she wrote the *Harry Potter* series. After his father walked out on the family, Jay-Z’s mother, Gloria Carter, worked for the city of New York and as a security guard to bring up the rap legend in Brooklyn’s Marcy projects.

recentArticles.title: Hayden Panettiere Details ‘Shocking’ Moment She Was Put in Bed at 18 with an ‘Undressed’ and ‘Very Famous’ Man on a Boat - AOL.com
recentArticles.snippet: # Hayden Panettiere Details ‘Shocking’ Moment She Was Put in Bed at 18 with an ‘Undressed’ and ‘Very Famous’ Man on a Boat. * Hayden Panettiere said she was “quite literally out to sea” when she realized she was “in danger” during the encounter. * The actress recalled being led into a small room and placed in a bed next to an “undressed” and “very famous” man. During the Monday, May 11 episode of Jay Shetty’s podcast, *On Purpose with Jay Shetty*, the actress, 36, discussed a chapter from her upcoming memoir, *This Is Me: A Reckoning*, in which she recounts being placed in an uncomfortable and frightening situation aboard a boat when she was 18. “She physically put me in the bed next to this undressed man who was very famous,” Panettiere said, adding that he appeared to behave “like this was just an average day for him.”.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導關於女演員Hayden Panettiere分享其不愉快經歷，與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: Stephen Colbert Answers Questions From Jay Leno, Jimmy Kimmel, Seth Meyers & More Late-Night Hosts | THR Video - The Hollywood Reporter
recentArticles.snippet: Subscribe for full access to The Hollywood Reporter. ## Video. # Stephen Colbert Answers Questions From Jay Leno, Jimmy Kimmel, Seth Meyers & More Late-Night Hosts | THR Video. Ahead of the end of *The Late Show*, host Stephen Colbert sat down to answer questions from his fellow current and former late-night hosts, including Jay Leno, Jimmy Fallon, Jimmy Kimmel, Seth Meyers, Conan O’Brien, James Corden and Trevor Noah on set of his *The Hollywood Reporter* cover shoot. * ### Richard Gadd on the Inspiration for 'Half Man,' 'Baby Reindeer' Success, What Makes Him Laugh & More | THR Video. * ### THR Power Stylists: The Pros Behind Kate Hudson, Chase Infiniti & More Stars' Iconic Looks | THR Video. * ### THR Power Stylists: Kate Hudson With Stylist Sophie Lopez | THR Video. recentArticles.summary: 這則新聞報導了Stephen Colbert接受其他深夜節目主持人提問的內容，與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: Jamie Foxx, Kevin Hart Surprise Crowd During Ludacris Set at Carbone Beach Event in Miami - billboard.com
recentArticles.snippet: # Jamie Foxx, Kevin Hart Surprise Crowd During Ludacris Set at Carbone Beach Event in Miami. Ludacris surprised a star-studded crowd in Miami over the weekend as American Express and Carbone returned for the fifth year of their “Carbone Beach” dinner series on the sand. “I’ve got some surprises,” the rapper teased midway through his set, before bringing out Fat Joe to perform “Lean Back” and “All the Way Up.” The cameos continued as Wyclef Jean appeared on stage to perform the Fugees’ hit, “Ready or Not,” while Miami local DJ Khaled joined Ludacris later on for the remix to their 2010 collab, “All I Do Is Win.”. The biggest surprise came toward the end of night as Ludacris spotted dinner guest Jamie Foxx in the audience and playfully goaded the actor into coming on stage to perform his song “Unpredictable,” which features a Ludacris rap verse.
recentArticles.summary: 這篇新聞報導了Jamie Foxx和Kevin Hart在Ludacris的邁阿密Carbone Beach活動中驚喜現身，但內容與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: Whitmire inks with MCA - Country Standard Time
recentArticles.snippet: **Monday, May 11, 2026** – Country traditionalist Kenny Whitmire signed with MCA, unveiled the song "One Foot In The Grave" and announced his debut EP, "Fool In A King Size Bed," arriving June 12. Whitmire also released a video for the song. "Signing with MCA is one of those moments you dream about as a kid," Whitmire said. "To finally be here, putting out 'One Foot In The Grave' and announcing 'Fool In A King Size Bed,' it means a lot. Whitmire released "Thought Twice About Loving You," the ballad "You're Getting Colder," "I Gave Her The Moon" and "Me Being Me" earlier this year. "'One Foot In The Grave' is simply about my love for country music," Whitmire said. "My version of a 'Prop Me Up Beside The Jukebox' type song. I'm happy to have a song like this to put on my debut EP 'Fool In A King Size Bed'. Fool In A King Size Bed (Kenny Whitmire, Rhett Akins, Kat Higgins).
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞資訊與周杰倫無關，內容主要報導鄉村歌手Kenny Whitmire簽約MCA並發行新歌與EP。

recentArticles.title: Sony Music Publishing Acquires Recognition Music Group - The Hollywood Reporter
recentArticles.snippet: The deal gives Sony rights to 45,000 songs including hits from the likes of Red Hot Chili Peppers, Fleetwood Mac and Justin Bieber among others. Sony Music Publishing has officially acquired Recognition Music Group from Blackstone, the companies announced on Monday, giving Sony ownership of publishing catalogs from the likes of Justin Timberlake, Justin Bieber and the Red Hot Chili Peppers among many others. The company had been a major player in the catalog acquisition boom of the early 2020s, making deals with many hit songwriters and producers along with recording artists including a $200 million deal for Bieber’s publishing catalog and over $140 million for the Chili Peppers’. “Our investment in this extraordinary catalog reflects our belief in the enduring power of great music – a belief that resonates deeply throughout Sony Music Group and is shared by our partners at GIC,” Sony Music Publishing CEO Jon Platt said in a statement.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導Sony Music Publishing收購Recognition Music Group，內容未提及周杰倫。

recentArticles.title: Kes Teases New Album; Talks Tiny Desk Debut & Hopping On Di Genius’ ‘Hill & Gully’ Riddim: ‘Nobody Expected That!’ - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # Kes Teases New Album; Talks Tiny Desk Debut & Hopping On Di Genius’ ‘Hill & Gully’ Riddim: ‘Nobody Expected That!’. The Kes the Band frontman checks in with *Billboard* at the 2026 Saint Lucia Jazz & Arts Festival. There were still two more days of this year’s Saint Lucia Jazz & Arts Festival following Kes the Band’s terrific Friday night headlining set (May 8) — and the soca group cleared all the competition. Fronted by Kees Dieffenthaller, who also goes by Kes, the band delivered an hour of high-energy renditions of contemporary soca bangers like “Wotless,” “Savannah Grass” and “Cocoa Tea.” The festival stop is just the latest in a string of hectic periods for the band — including a pair of Jazz @ Lincoln Center shows in January and the forthcoming North American leg of its Roots, Rock, Soca Tour. “When I was coming down on the plane, I had the chance to have a one-on-one with Billy Ocean, who’s also from Trinidad.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導主要關於Kes the Band的新專輯和演出活動，內容中並未提及周杰倫。
